Localization.Description: A user added to, changed in, or removed a device from a white list

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} added the device with ID "{object.id}" to the white list "{datafield7}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} changed the validity period of the device with ID "{object.id}" in the white list "{datafield7}" to "{object.property}:{object.new_value}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed the device with ID "{object.id}" from the white list "{datafield7}" on host {event_src.host}
